vlrggapi — vendored as a git submodule (see ../.gitmodules and the gitlink at vendor/vlrggapi)

Upstream:       https://github.com/axsddlr/vlrggapi
Branch tracked: master
Pinned commit:  a6075fec9757ae5394c9a50002ba40270f4a5d00
Pinned on:      2026-06-04
Pinned by:      P1.T1 (phase-1-vlrggapi-setup)

Why pinned: vlr.gg HTML can change and break the scraper; we control upgrades by
bumping this submodule to a reviewed commit rather than tracking master live.

To update to a newer upstream commit:
  git -C vendor/vlrggapi fetch origin
  git -C vendor/vlrggapi checkout <new-sha>
  git add vendor/vlrggapi
  # then update the "Pinned commit"/"Pinned on" lines above and commit
